channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SIS] SIS Ltd Q4 FY26 Results Approved; Rita Sinha Appointed Executive Chairperson
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SIS Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The audit reports were issued with an unmodified opinion. Additionally, Mrs. Rita Kishore Sinha was appointed as an Executive Director and redesignated as the Executive Chairperson of the Company for a period of five years, effective May 1, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. Mrs. Sinha, currently a Non-executive Chairperson, brings over 38 years of legal experience and is related to the Managing Director and a Non-Executive Director. The company also enclosed an Earnings Update and a press release.

  • Board approved audited Q4 FY26 and full-year financial results.
  • Audit reports for the financial results received an unmodified opinion.
  • Mrs. Rita Kishore Sinha appointed Executive Chairperson for 5 years.
  • Appointment effective May 1, 2026, pending shareholder approval.
  • She is related to the MD and a Non-Executive Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SIS Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [COFORGE] Coforge closes Cigniti acquisition; NCLT sanctions merger
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Coforge announced the successful closure of its acquisition of Cigniti Technologies, following the Hon'ble NCLT's sanction of the Scheme of Amalgamation. This milestone, with an Appointed Date of April 1, 2025, completes all regulatory requirements. The acquisition has significantly expanded Coforge's Healthcare business and US presence. Post-acquisition, Cigniti's EBITDA margin improved from 11% to 19% in six quarters, and its top two client revenues tripled from $25 million to $75 million annually. Coforge is now positioned as a $2.5 billion firm with a $2 billion core in AI-led Engineering, Data, and Cloud services, aiming for accelerated global growth.

  • NCLT sanctioned Coforge's Scheme of Amalgamation with Cigniti Technologies.
  • Coforge successfully closed the Cigniti acquisition after regulatory approvals.
  • Acquired business EBITDA margin expanded from 11% to 19% in six quarters.
  • Top two acquired clients' revenue grew from $25 million to $75 million annually.
  • Coforge is now a $2.5 Bn firm, strengthening AI-led engineering services.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Coforge Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [SUDARSHAN] Sudarshan Pharma: Sachin Mehta Resigns as CFO, Continues as JMD
item.description:
Sudarshan Pharma Industries Ltd announced that Mr. Sachin Mehta has resigned from his position as Chief Financial Officer, effective May 1, 2026. He will, however, continue to serve as the Joint Managing Director of the company. The company informed the stock exchanges about this change in management, noting that Mr. Mehta is a relative of Mr. Hemal Mehta, the Chairman & Managing Director. This transition ensures his continued involvement in the company's leadership.

  • Sachin Mehta resigns as CFO, effective May 1, 2026.
  • He will continue as Joint Managing Director of the company.
  • The change involves a key management personnel.
  • Sachin Mehta is a relative of the Chairman & Managing Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sudarshan Pharma Industries Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SIS] SIS Appoints Rita Kishore Sinha as Executive Chairperson
item.description:
SIS Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 30, 2026, approved the appointment and redesignation of Mrs. Rita Kishore Sinha as the Executive Chairperson for a five-year term, effective May 1, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. Mrs. Sinha, who previously served as Non-executive Chairperson, brings over 38 years of legal experience. She is also the mother of Mr. Rituraj Kishore Sinha, Managing Director, and Ms. Rivoli Sinha, Non-Executive Director. Additionally, the Board approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, which were issued with an unmodified opinion.

  • SIS Board appointed Mrs. Rita Kishore Sinha as Executive Chairperson.
  • Her five-year term begins May 1, 2026, pending shareholder approval.
  • She has 38 years of legal experience and is related to two other directors.
  • Board also approved audited Q4 and FY26 financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SIS Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SIS] SIS Ltd Board Approves Q4 FY26 Results & Appoints Executive Chairperson
item.description:
SIS Limited's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 30, 2026, approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board approved the appointment of Mrs. Rita Kishore Sinha (DIN: 00945652) as an Executive Director and her redesignation as the Executive Chairperson of the Company for a period of five years, effective May 1, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. Mrs. Sinha, currently a Non-executive Chairperson with over 38 years of legal experience, is the mother of Mr. Rituraj Kishore Sinha (Managing Director) and Ms. Rivoli Sinha (Non-Executive Director). The audit reports for the financial results were issued with an unmodified opinion.

  • Board approved audited Q4 FY26 and full-year financial results.
  • Mrs. Rita Kishore Sinha appointed Executive Chairperson for 5 years.
  • Appointment is subject to shareholder approval.
  • Audit reports for financial results received unmodified opinion.
  • Mrs. Sinha is related to current MD and Non-Executive Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SIS Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [CIGNITI] Cigniti, Coforge Amalgamation Scheme Approved by NCLT
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Chandigarh Bench, has approved the Scheme of Amalgamation of Cigniti Technologies Limited with and into Coforge Limited. The approval follows an announcement dated March 27, 2026, and is under sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013. The appointed date for the scheme is April 1, 2025. Cigniti is taking the necessary steps as outlined in the scheme, with the order copy available on the NCLT website.

  • NCLT approves Cigniti Technologies' amalgamation with Coforge.
  • The amalgamation is under Sections 230-232 of the Companies Act, 2013.
  • Appointed date for the scheme is April 1, 2025.
  • Order copy is available on the NCLT website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CIGNITI TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [IIFL] IIFL Fintech to acquire 87.8% stake in Xtracap Fintech for ₹37.7 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

IIFL Finance's wholly-owned subsidiary, IIFL Fintech Private Limited, will acquire an 87.8% equity stake in Xtracap Fintech India Private Limited for approximately ₹37.7 Crore. The acquisition involves a secondary purchase of shares for ₹25.7 Crore and a primary capital infusion of ₹12 Crore. Xtracap Fintech, with a FY25 turnover of ₹7.03 Crore, operates in supply chain financing. This strategic move aims to expand IIFL Fintech's presence in the underserved supply chain financing segment, strengthen MSME lending capabilities, diversify its portfolio, and improve return metrics. The transaction is a related party transaction but conducted at arm's length and is expected to complete within 45 days.

  • IIFL Fintech to acquire 87.8% equity in Xtracap Fintech.
  • Total cash consideration for the acquisition is ₹37.7 Crore.
  • Expands IIFL's presence in supply chain financing segment.
  • Strengthens MSME lending and diversifies portfolio.
  • Acquisition expected to be completed within 45 days.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IIFL Finance Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SIS] SIS FY26 Record Year: PAT up 28% YoY; Q4 Revenue ₹4,489 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SIS Ltd. announced its audited financial results for the quarter and full year ended March 31, 2026. FY26 was a record year with PAT growing 28% YoY. For Q4 FY26, consolidated revenue from operations increased 31.0% YoY to ₹4,489.3 Cr, while EBITDA grew 25.6% YoY to ₹207.0 Cr. Operating PAT for the quarter rose 27.9% YoY to ₹105.5 Cr. All segments demonstrated strong growth: Security Solutions India revenue was up 34.2% YoY, Security Solutions International grew 36.9% YoY, and Facility Management Solutions saw an 8.1% YoY increase. Return Ratios were robust with ROCE at 16.5% and RoE at 15.8%. Net Debt to EBITDA improved to 0.99x, and OCF/EBITDA was 203.3%. SIS returned approximately ₹250 Cr to shareholders in FY26 through dividends and buybacks. Management termed FY26 a "REBOUND year" and potentially an "INFLECTION year."

  • SIS reported record FY26 results with PAT growing 28% YoY.
  • Q4 FY26 revenue rose 31% YoY to ₹4,489.3 Cr; operating PAT grew 27.9% YoY.
  • All segments, including Security India, International, and Facility Management, showed strong growth.
  • Net Debt/EBITDA improved to 0.99x; OCF/EBITDA was 203.3% for the quarter.
  • Company returned ~₹250 Cr to shareholders via dividends and buybacks in FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SIS Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [SIS] SIS Ltd FY26 PAT Grew 28% YoY
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SIS Ltd announced its audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported a 31% YoY increase in revenue from operations, reaching ₹4,489.3 cr. EBITDA grew by 25.6% YoY to ₹207.0 cr. The company returned approximately ₹250 cr. to shareholders through dividends and buybacks in FY26. SIS is a market leader in security and facility management solutions.

  • SIS Ltd's revenue from operations increased by 31% YoY to ₹4,489.3 cr in Q4 FY26.
  • EBITDA grew by 25.6% YoY to ₹207.0 cr with an EBITDA margin of 4.6%.
  • Security Solutions India revenue grew 34.2% YoY, reaching ₹1,925 cr.
  • Security Solutions International revenue was ₹1,950 Cr, a 36.9% YoY growth.
  • Facility Management Solutions revenue grew 8.1% YoY to ₹635 Cr, with EBITDA margin expanding to 5.5%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SIS Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [TIINDIA] Tube Investments Board to Meet May 13 for FY26 Results, Dividend, NCDs
item.description:
Tube Investments of India Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for May 13, 2026. The agenda includes approving the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board will also consider recommending a final dividend, if any, for FY26 and approving long-term borrowings through the issue of non-convertible debentures (NCDs) during FY 2026-27. The trading window for dealing in company shares will remain closed until May 15, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 13, 2026.
  • To approve Audited Standalone and Consolidated FY26 financial results.
  • To consider recommendation of final dividend for FY26.
  • To approve long-term borrowings via NCDs for FY2026-27.
  • Trading window closed until May 15, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tube Investments of India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
